trivia: The biggest Embraer ever built and the E2 family's best seller. Porter's jet fleet and Azul's trunk routes proved a 146-seat regional jet can do mainline work.
The longest E-Jet plus giant GTF nacelles: once you see one, you stop confusing E2s with first-generation jets forever.
funFacts: The largest airliner ever built in Brazil.
Its 'Profit Hunter' demonstrators wore shark and eagle faces.
